---
title: "CO2xN_CH4_Compile"
output: pdf_document
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
---

```{r}

library(here)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(purrr)
library(data.table)
library(tidyverse)
```


```{r}

year <- "2025"

ch4_path <- "GCReW_CO2xNxPhrag_Porewater_"

CH4_may_dat <- read.csv(here("..", "GCREW","CO2xNxPhrag", "Porewater", "CH4", year, "Processed Data", paste0(ch4_path, "CH4_", year, "05", ".csv")))

CH4_july_dat <- read.csv(here("..", "GCREW","CO2xNxPhrag", "Porewater", "CH4", year, "Processed Data", paste0(ch4_path, "CH4_", year, "07", ".csv")))

CH4_sept_dat <- read.csv(here("..", "GCREW","CO2xNxPhrag", "Porewater", "CH4", year, "Processed Data", paste0(ch4_path, "CH4_", year, "09", ".csv")))

```

```{r}

CH4_dat <- rbind(CH4_july_dat[,-1], CH4_may_dat[,-1], CH4_sept_dat[,-1])
```

```{r}
write.csv(CH4_dat, paste0("CO2xNxPhrag_Porewater_CH4_", year, ".csv"))

```
